fields.Name: Default - SVS + gte-small (Local)
fields.Description: Default in-process Vector Index for Entity Documents that want hybrid search via Provider.SearchEntity without standing up an external vector store. The 'index' is a logical pairing — vectors live in MJ: Entity Record Documents.VectorJSON and SimpleVectorServiceProvider rehydrates them on demand, keyed by EntityDocumentID. Use this VectorIndex when seeding a Search-type EntityDocument backed by the gte-small (Local) embedding model. Configure a separate Vector Index per (VectorDatabase, EmbeddingModel) pair you want to use; the EntityDocument's AIModelID and the index's EmbeddingModelID must match.
